prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京体育大学在山东省综合科类最低录取位次分别为约29794名、26928名、74534名（2023年因旅游管理专业出现异常断档）、34116名、34716名。 排除2023年异常值后，近4年位次在26928–34716区间波动，2024–2025年稳定在约34000–35000名区间，2025年基准位次约34716名；该校在山东省综合科类招生 计划持续缩减：2021年41人→2022年28人→2023年25人→2024年16人→2025年15人。2026年计划扩至18人，较2025年增加3人，增幅20%，为近5年首次扩招，对竞 争压力有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第177名，属于体育类专门院校中的最高学府，层次定位明确；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及CUVA排球联赛决赛中主场球迷争议事件，对学校公众形象有一定影响；抖音热度评价为"高热"，综合热度排名第18，短视频 平台曝光量较高，反映报考关注度不低；北京体育大学以体育学为核心优势学科（。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年山东省考生总数约72万人，较2025年增加约3.9万人（ 增幅约5.7%），竞争加剧。专业热度方面，计算机类（数据科学与大数据技术、智能体育工程） 为高热推荐，新闻传播类（新闻学、网络与新媒体）明显劝退，外语类一般观望；北京体育大学位于北京市，对山东省考生而言属于跨省报考，学校在山东省的 招生占比呈逐年下降趋势（从2021年41人降至2025年15人），2026年回升至18人，但仍远低于早期水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在34000–35000名区间趋于稳定、2026年 招生计划扩招20%（缓解竞争）、山东省考生总数增长约5.7%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（轻微降温）以及抖音高热（关注度较高）等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增长效应相互对 冲后，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年基准略有后移。预测最低位次约37682名，位次区间37182–38182名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Sport University in Shandong Province's comprehensive category were approximately 29,794, 26,928, 74,534 (2023 saw an abnormal drop due to the tourism management major), 34,116, and 34,716. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the rankings over the past 4 years fluctuated between 26,928 and 34,716, stabilizing around 34,000–35,000 in 2024–2025, with a baseline of about 34,716 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Shandong's comprehensive category has been continuously shrinking: 41 in 2021 → 28 in 2022 → 25 in 2023 → 16 in 2024 → 15 in 2025. In 2026, the plan expands to 18, an increase of 3 from 2025 (20% growth), marking the first expansion in nearly 5 years, which somewhat alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 177th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. It is the highest institution among specialized sports colleges, with a clear hierarchical positioning. In 2026, its reputation is slightly negative, mainly due to a controversial incident involving home fans during the CUVA Volleyball League finals, which has somewhat impacted the university's public image. Douyin (TikTok) popularity is rated as 'high heat,' with a comprehensive popularity ranking of 18th, indicating high exposure on short video platforms and reflecting considerable attention from applicants. Beijing Sport University's core advantage lies in sports science.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of examinees in Shandong Province is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (approximately 5.7%) from 2025, intensifying competition. In terms of major popularity, computer-related fields (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Intelligent Sports Engineering) are highly recommended, journalism and communication fields (Journalism, Network and New Media) are clearly discouraged, and foreign language fields are generally wait-and-see. Beijing Sport University is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Shandong examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Shandong has been declining year by year (from 41 in 2021 to 15 in 2025), rebounding to 18 in 2026, but still far below earlier levels.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the stabilization of historical rankings in the 34,000–35,000 range, the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the approximately 5.7% increase in Shandong examinees (intensifying competition), a slightly negative reputation (mild cooling), and high Douyin popularity (high attention), the expansion effect and examinee growth effect offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to the 2025 baseline. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37,682, with a ranking range of 37,182–38,182.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 37,682, range 37,182–38,182. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 37,000 consider Tier 1 majors (Journalism, Marxist Theory, Network and New Media) as reach choices; candidates with rankings between 37,000 and 38,000 should focus on Tier 2 majors (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Chinese International Education, English, Sports Economics and Management) as primary choices; candidates with rankings above 38,000 can consider Tier 3 majors (Applied Psychology, Sports Rehabilitation, Sports Human Science, Intelligent Sports Engineering) as safety options. Note that the new majors in 2026, Intelligent Sports Engineering and Sports Rehabilitation, combine sports characteristics with emerging interdisciplinary attributes and are worth attention.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京体育大学在山东省医学类（康复物理治疗）近五年最低录取位次分别为：2021年24991名、2022年30493名、2023年30680名、2024年47164名、2025年48195名。招生计划方面 ，2021年为2人，2022至2025年稳定在3人，2026年招生计划仍为3人，与2025年持平。从位次走势看，2021至2022年位次大幅下降约5500名，2022至2023年基本持平，2023至2024 年再次大幅下降约16484名，2024至2025年继续下降约1031名，整体呈现持续下滑（位次数字增大、竞争加剧）态势，但降幅在2025年明显收窄。2026年计划不变，预计位次将继 续小幅下滑。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，国家211工程重点建设高校，国家双一流建设高校，位于北京市。作为国内体育类院校的最高学府，其医学类专业（康复物理治疗） 依托学校在运动科学领域的深厚积淀，具有较高的学科认可度和行业影响力，对有志于运动康复方向的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 康复物理治疗属于医学技术类专业，近年来随着全民健康意识提升和运动康复需求增长，报考热度持续上升。北京体育大学地处首都北京，地域优势明显，对山东省考生有较强 吸引力。山东省内医学类招生规模较大，但北京体育大学在山东仅投放康复物理治疗一个医学类专业，招生人数极少（仅3人），稀缺性进一步推高了竞争程度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续下滑趋势、2026年招生计划持平、专业热度上升及地域吸引力等因素，预计2026年北京体育大学医学类（康复物理治疗）最低录取位次将继续小幅下滑至48545 名左右，波动区间为48045至49045名。

一档（最难进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京体育大学在山东省医学类仅设康复物理治疗一个专业，招生计划仅3人，竞争激烈。位次在预测区间内的考生可积极填报，建议将该专业作为冲刺目标，同时准备其他院校的 医学类专业作为保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Beijing Sport University's Medicine (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in Shandong Province over the past five years are: 2021: 24,991, 2022: 30,493, 2023: 30,680, 2024: 47,164, 2025: 48,195. In terms of enrollment plan, it was 2 in 2021, stable at 3 from 2022 to 2025, and remains 3 in 2026, unchanged from 2025. From the ranking trend, there was a significant drop of about 5,500 from 2021 to 2022, basically flat from 2022 to 2023, another significant drop of about 16,484 from 2023 to 2024, and a continued drop of about 1,031 from 2024 to 2025, showing an overall continuous decline (ranking numbers increase, competition intensifies), but the decline narrowed significantly in 2025. With the plan unchanged in 2026, the ranking is expected to continue a slight decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a national 211 Project key construction university, and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Beijing. As the highest institution of sports in China, its medical major (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) relies on the school's deep accumulation in sports science, with high disciplinary recognition and industry influence, strongly attracting candidates interested in sports rehabilitation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Rehabilitation Physical Therapy belongs to the medical technology category. In recent years, with the rise of national health awareness and the growth of sports rehabilitation demand, the popularity of applying for this major has been increasing. Beijing Sport University is located in the capital Beijing, with obvious regional advantages, strongly attracting candidates from Shandong Province. The scale of medical enrollment in Shandong Province is relatively large, but Beijing Sport University only offers one medical major (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in Shandong, with a very small enrollment (only 3 people), and the scarcity further increases competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the rising popularity of the major, and regional attractiveness, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Beijing Sport University's Medicine (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in 2026 will continue to decline slightly to around 48,545, with a fluctuation range of 48,045 to 49,045.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Rehabilitation Physical Therapy
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beijing Sport University only offers one medical major (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in Shandong Province, with an enrollment plan of only 3 people, making competition fierce. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range can actively apply, and it is recommended to set this major as a sprint goal while preparing other medical majors from other schools as a safety net.
